name: Easy
short_description: ▎Easy- 2D dynamic platformer, made in the style of minimalism and has a creative approach to level design, each level becomes a real challenge and gives a lot of emotions. Discover new tactics and approaches to completing the game. Be smart and enter the top players of the game "Easy"!
detailed_description:
Easy is a challenging 2D platformer offering 22 interesting and challenging levels filled with many traps. Complete them as quickly as possible and beat your previous time records!

▎The goal of the game is to overcome obstacles in a short time.

Upgrade your skills in Easy mode to complete even difficult levels quickly. Compete with other players on your high scores in each level.

▎Challenge — The "Hard" Level

The "Hard" level offers you maximum difficulty. It's not just hard — it's a challenge that no one has passed yet — be the first! Be sure to turn on the camera after completing this level, the developer has prepared a gift for you.

Information about the "Hard" level:

The level does not relate to the plot, so it is unlocked immediately along with the first level.

  • More than 70 obstacles

  • The average score of the complete passage is 6%

  • Time to complete is 30 minutes (after which you will return to the beginning of the level)

▎ Study — your skills

If the level turned out to be too easy for you, please note: each level requires new tactics and time to study it. Test which strategies help you overcome the levels.

▎ Survival — don 't relax

Be prepared for the unexpected — in Easy, any step can be decisive. Estimate the number of obstacles and your chances of passing through them to keep your completed scores. Will you be able to complete this challenging platformer?

▎ Records

There is a timer in each level, and your best time gets into the high score section. You can share your records on social media with the tag "#XG_Easy". This way, the developers are more likely to notice you and give you a gift for a decent result or an epic passage. Upgrade your skills!
